heading: EUROPEAN ENERGY SECURITY AND DIVERSIFICATION
label: III EUROPEAN ENERGY SECURITY AND DIVERSIFICATION
notes: CodificationThis subchapter was enacted as part of the European Energy Security and Diversification Act of 2019, and also as part of the Further Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2020, and not as part of the Countering Russian Influence in Europe and Eurasia Act of 2017 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Prioritization of efforts and assistance for energy infrastructure projects in Europe and Eurasia
